results.title: Satluj: Government panel backs ban, says film goes against India's sovereignty and integrity
results.description: The Diljit Dosanjh-starrer movie is based on the life of the late human rights activist Jaswant Singh Khalra, who documented the cremation of thousands of unidentified bodies in Punjab between 1984 and 1994.

results.title: Lenin worldwide box office collection day 1: Akhil Akkineni celebrates career-best opening with emotional moment
results.description: Akhil Akkineni’s Lenin has recorded the biggest opening of his career, with the actor celebrating the film’s box office performance alongside father Nagarjuna. Read on.

results.title: Book Review | Tales that trade the romanticised mountain life for honest human encounters
results.description: Author Bela Negi’s The Tree With Eyes explores mountain life beyond its usual image, revealing changing realities through flawed yet deeply human characters.
